docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR OSC CONTINUANCE/CONTINUANCE OF CASE MANAGEMENT HEARING. IN THE ALTERNATIVE, REQUEST FOR CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER WITHOUT APPEARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION OF PLTFS REQUEST TO COMPEL THE CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR THE COURT TO ENTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. HEARING SET FOR FEB-08-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-08-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION OF PLAINTIFFS REQUEST TO COMPEL THE CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR THE COURT TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE COURT ONLY RECEIVED A COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION. FURTHER, THE CLERK OR A PROVE-UP HEARING JUDGE ENTERS DEFAULT JUDGMENTS. THE MOTION WAS DIRECTED TO THE WRONG DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Pltfs Request To Compel The Clerk To Enter Default Judgment Or In The Alternative For The Court To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S Motion Of PlAINtIFfs Request To Compel The Clerk To Enter Default Judgment Or In The Alternative For The Court To Enter Judgment is off calendar. The Court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court only received a copy of the proposed order granting the motion. Further, the clerk or a prove-up hearing judge enters default judgments. The motion was directed to the wrong department. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
